examples: A corps of doctors arrived to inoculate the recruits.
Entrepreneurs can't completely inoculate their businesses from the vagaries of the market.
The size of the batch depends on how many eggs a manufacturer can obtain, inoculate and incubate.
Some 150, 000 people across India eventually labored to find and inoculate people against smallpox.
Sometimes it's done for a good cause--Amanda Peet asking parents to inoculate their children.
